name: MOUNTAIN MUDD ESPRESSO

violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate. -No documentation of current certified manager.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Using low splash bleach as sanitizer.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Condensate hose was not attached in 2 door freezer. Large chunk of ice sitting on/near food. Reattached hose at time of inspection.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Was using low splash bleach. Use regular unscented bleach. Do not use low or no splash bleach.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -Drain hose on big ice machine needs to be raised so it is above the plain of the floor...currently hose is down inside drain well.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager (Tanya 1/6/26) had an expired certificate. -Recommend more frequent visits to facility by serve safe employee.

source_address: 2200 N MAPLE AVE STE 609, Rapid City
